_comment: BI-WEEKLY RE-FLIGHT template. Updates an EXISTING share in place: same /share/<token> link, same drawn boundaries (they're preserved), tiles swapped for the new flight. Copy this, fill in the share you're re-flighting + the new flight's files, then run: node scripts/publish-survey.mjs scripts/reflight.example.json
_identify_the_share: Pick ONE of share_url / token / share_id to name the share to update. share_url is easiest — paste the link you already share with the client.
_optional_metadata: Omit these to keep the existing title/emails. Include any you want to change this flight.
_new_flight_files: Point each layer at THIS flight's orthophotos (the boundaries don't move; only the imagery underneath updates).
_recount_plants: Set this to THIS flight's orthomosaic id (from upload-ortho.mjs). It refreshes points.json so the inventory re-counts plants inside each fixed boundary against the latest map. Drop it if this flight has no detections yet.
